summary: Tested TravelNest AI backend (FastAPI + JWT + MongoDB + Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations) and Expo/React Native mobile-first frontend end to end on the public EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Backend pytest suite: 19/19 passed. Frontend: auth, all 5 tabs, Nova chat, Services (booking + rail food + plane plan), Safety (chips + contact + GPS button), Profile (quick-pay + custom payment + sync + music save), and Google placeholder behaviour all verified. Demo user demo@travelnest.ai / Pass1234 already existed and login worked.

integration_issues.issue: On Expo web, Alert.alert with 'Cancel' + 'Logout' destructive buttons is rendered as window.confirm(); auto-accepting the dialog kept the user on /profile instead of navigating to /auth. This is a react-native-web limitation; on real iOS/Android the native Alert with two buttons works as designed. Recommend either (a) skipping the confirm and logging out directly, or (b) on web use a custom modal instead of Alert.alert. NOT a backend bug, NOT a mobile bug — only a web e2e test concern.

issues: Console warns: 'shadow* style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' (theme.ts shadows)
Console warns: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' (likely from a 3rd-party component)
Console warns: 'Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode.'

action_items: (Optional polish) Migrate StyleSheet shadow* props to boxShadow (RN 0.76+) in /app/frontend/src/theme.ts to silence deprecation warnings.
(Optional polish) Replace Alert.alert logout confirm with a custom RN modal so web e2e tests can confirm logout. Native mobile is unaffected.

package.json drift: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 (expected 2.2.0) and expo-location@55.1.9 (expected ~19.0.8) — Expo CLI flagged at boot; run 'npx expo install --fix' if main agent wants to align.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well structured (~490 lines, single file is acceptable). Auth uses bcrypt + PyJWT, MongoDB ObjectId is excluded everywhere via projection {'_id': 0}.
All authenticated routes correctly scope queries by user_id — verified by reading the helper _list_docs and inspecting each handler.
Nova chat session_id is namespaced as user_id:session_id when calling LlmChat, preventing cross-user memory leakage. Good.
/api/payments/{id}/sync correctly enforces ownership via {id, user_id} match before flipping status.

success_rate.frontend: ~95% (10/11 flows; logout dialog quirk on web only)

seed_data_creation: demo@travelnest.ai already existed. Tests created TEST_-prefixed bookings, rail food, plane plans, contacts, safety messages, gps pings, partners, payments and music saves under the demo user.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://voyage-compass-11.preview.emergentagent.com. Demo user demo@travelnest.ai / Pass1234. All testIDs are populated and stable: auth-{email,password,submit,google}-input/button, home-journey-card, home-quick-{hotel,rail-food,music,pickup,plane}, home-nova-cta, nova-{input,send-button,message-list,suggest-*}, svc-{chip-*,location,need,save-booking}, menu-add-{item}, rail-{coach,station,place-order}, plane-{flight,airport,need,save}, safety-{gps-detect,quick-{safe,dlay,eta,sos},contact-{name,phone,save}}, pay-quick-{food,hotl,ride,pass}, pay-{purpose,amount,payee,queue}, pay-sync-{id6}, music-{title,artist,save}, profile-logout-button. Re-run pytest with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_travelnest_api.py -v.
rca_of_issue: Logout web behaviour: react-native-web maps Alert.alert(title, msg, [Cancel, Logout-destructive]) to window.confirm. Auto-accepting the confirm fires the FIRST button (Cancel) instead of the destructive one, so logout never executes. Reproduction: open /profile on Expo web, tap Logout, accept dialog → still on /profile. Mitigation: replace with platform-aware confirm or always-execute logout (no confirm on web).
